visuals.title: Memory Layout of an Integer Array
visuals.description: Visual diagram for Memory Layout of an Integer Array
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">One-Dimensional Arrays</text>

  <!-- Array Container -->
  <rect x="60" y="60" width="300" height="50" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>

  <!-- Array Elements -->
  <rect x="70" y="65" width="40" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="115" y="65" width="40" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="160" y="65" width="40" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="205" y="65" width="40" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="250" y="65" width="40" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <rect x="295" y="65" width="40" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>

  <!-- Element Values -->
  <text x="90" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    42
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="135" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    17
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="180" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    89
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="225" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    23
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="270" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    56
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="315" y="90" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    71
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Array Index Labels -->
  <text x="90" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    [0]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="135" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    [1]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="180" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    [2]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="225" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    [3]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="270" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    [4]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="315" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    [5]
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Array Declaration -->
  <rect x="60" y="170" width="300" height="30" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    int[] numbers = {42, 17, 89, 23, 56, 71};
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Access Pattern -->
  <rect x="60" y="220" width="300" height="30" fill="#E3F2FD" stroke="#64B5F6" stroke-width="1" rx="3" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="240" text-anchor="middle" font-family="monospace" font-size="12" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    int value = numbers[2]; // Returns 89
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="2.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow pointing to element [2] -->
  <path d="M180,145 L180,160 L160,160 L160,175" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" marker-end="url(#arrowhead)" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>

  <!-- Arrowhead marker definition -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowhead" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="7" refX="0" refY="3.5" orient="auto">
      <polygon points="0 0, 10 3.5, 0 7" fill="#1565C0"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Key Features -->
  <text x="210" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Key Features:
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="300" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    • Fixed size • Contiguous memory • Zero-based indexing
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
  <text x="210" y="315" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    • Random access • Homogeneous elements
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="3.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>

diagrams.title: Memory Layout of an Integer Array
